apiProvider.name: LLM API Provider
apiProvider.hint: Choose which LLM service to use for item generation

apiKey.name: API Key
apiKey.hint: Your API key for the selected LLM provider (not needed for local LLMs)

apiEndpoint.name: API Endpoint
apiEndpoint.hint: The API endpoint URL for your LLM service

model.name: Model Name
model.hint: The specific model to use. Examples: gpt-5, claude-4-sonnet, gemini-2.0-pro, llama3.2

folderName.name: Target Folder Name
folderName.hint: Name of the folder where generated items will be stored

openItemCreator.name: 🚀 Open Item Creator
openItemCreator.hint: Check this box to instantly open the Spacebone Item Creator dialog

ui.promptLabel: Describe the item you want to create:
ui.promptPlaceholder: Example: A magical ring that grants +2 to Dexterity and allows the wearer to cast invisibility once per day. It's made of mithril and has a small sapphire that glows when activated.
ui.apiNotConfigured: Please configure your LLM API settings in module settings first.
ui.enterDescription: Please enter a description for the item you want to create.
ui.creationFailed: Failed to create item. Check the console for details.

examples.elementalCloak: A cloak that grants resistance to cold and fire damage, and allows the wearer to cast endure elements at will.
examples.flamingSword: A +1 longsword that deals an extra 1d6 fire damage and can cast burning hands 3 times per day.
examples.waterWalkingBoots: Boots that increase movement speed by 10 feet and allow the wearer to walk on water for up to 1 hour per day.
examples.healingPotion: A healing potion that restores 2d4+2 hit points and removes one condition (poison, disease, or curse).

errors.createError: An error occurred while creating the item
errors.folderError: Failed to create or find folder: {name}
